pi_items.source: Task description specifies creating stage 'Negotiation'. Live test confirmed no pre-existing Negotiation stage (clean state). Existing stages: New(seq=1), Qualified(seq=2), Proposition(seq=3), Won(seq=70). setup_task.sh cleans up any prior Negotiation stage.
Task description says '75% default probability'. Consistent across task.json description and metadata.
Task description specifies this exact string. Live test confirmed no pre-existing lost reason with this name. setup_task.sh cleans up any prior instance.
Task description specifies this team name. Live test confirmed no pre-existing team with this name.
Task description says 'Mitchell Admin as team leader'. Live XML-RPC confirmed Mitchell Admin exists as user ID=2, login=admin.

Rule a: $180k >= $100k YES. Rule b: $180k >= $100k AND Proposition AND 65% >= 60% YES. Rule c: $180k not < $50k NO. Rule d: no RivalSoft in note (verified via live note scan). Rule e: no champion leaving in note (verified). Rules a,b apply.
Rule b applies: advance to Negotiation stage.
Rule a applies: assign to Strategic Accounts.
Rule a: Key Deal. Not lost: Q1-Reviewed. No RivalSoft: no Competitive. No champion leaving: no At Risk.

Rule c: mark as Lost with reason 'Gone Dark - No Response'.
Rule d: tag Competitive. Lost opportunity: no Q1-Reviewed tag.

Rule a applies.

Rule e: set priority to 3 stars (Urgent).
Rule e: schedule 'Call' activity for April 15, 2026 with summary 'Urgent: find new deal sponsor' assigned to Mitchell Admin. Matches task description exactly.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires the agent to restructure a CRM pipeline with 12 seeded opportunities across 9 companies. The infrastructure to create: a 'Negotiation' stage between Proposition (seq=3) and Won (seq=70) with 75% probability; a 'Strategic Accounts' sales team with Mitchell Admin (user ID=2) as leader; a 'Gone Dark - No Response' lost reason. The 12 opportunities and their correct final states are: (1) Enterprise Data Platform (Apex Global, $180k, Proposition, 65%) -> advance to Negotiation, assign Strategic Accounts, tag Key Deal + Q1-Reviewed. (2) Cloud Security Assessment (Apex Global, $45k, New, 8%) -> mark Lost (Gone Dark), tag Competitive. Its note mentions 'RivalSoft'. (3) IT Infrastructure Modernization (Boreal, $220k, Qualified, 40%) -> assign Strategic Accounts, tag Key Deal + At Risk + Q1-Reviewed, set priority 3 stars, schedule Call activity for 2026-04-15 'Urgent: find new deal sponsor'. Its note mentions champion Sarah Chen 'is leaving'. (4) Annual Support Renewal (Boreal, $32k, Won, 100%) -> tag Q1-Reviewed only. (5) AI/ML Pipeline Integration (Caspian Technologies, $95k, Qualified, 55%) -> tag Q1-Reviewed only. (6) API Gateway Setup (currently on 'Caspian Tech' duplicate, $38k, New, 10%) -> transfer to Caspian Technologies, mark Lost (Gone Dark). (7) Marketing Automation Platform (Dawnlight, $150k, Proposition, 70%) -> advance to Negotiation, assign Strategic Accounts, tag Key Deal + Competitive + Q1-Reviewed. Its note mentions 'RivalSoft'. (8) ERP System Upgrade (Evergreen, $310k, Qualified, 35%) -> assign Strategic Accounts, tag Key Deal + Competitive + Q1-Reviewed. Its note mentions 'RivalSoft'. (9) Employee Portal Development (Evergreen, $55k, Proposition, 50%) -> rename to 'Employee Portal - Phase 1', update revenue to $40,000 (original quote mentioned in notes), log note 'Revenue and scope corrected per Q1 review.', tag Q1-Reviewed. (10) IoT Fleet Management (Falcon, $125k, New, 25%) -> assign Strategic Accounts, tag Key Deal + Q1-Reviewed. (11) DevOps Pipeline Automation (Granite, $88k, Qualified, 45%) -> tag Competitive + Q1-Reviewed. Its note mentions 'RivalSoft'. (12) Business Intelligence Dashboard (Highland, $72k, Proposition, 60%) -> tag At Risk + Q1-Reviewed, set priority 3 stars, schedule Call activity for 2026-04-15 'Urgent: find new deal sponsor'. Its note mentions champion 'is departing'. The Caspian Tech duplicate company (ID=44) must be archived after transferring API Gateway Setup to Caspian Technologies (ID=43). Key rule thresholds: revenue >= $100k triggers rule a (5 opps: opp01,03,07,08,10); revenue >= $100k AND Proposition AND prob >= 60% triggers rule b (2 opps: opp01,07); revenue < $50k AND New AND prob <= 10% triggers rule c (2 opps: opp02,06); 'RivalSoft' in notes triggers rule d (4 opps: opp02,07,08,11); champion leaving/departing triggers rule e (2 opps: opp03,12). All non-lost opportunities (8 total) get Q1-Reviewed tag.
